channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Video shows fire engine weaving through traffic before rollover crash
item.description: New footage captures an LAPD fire engine swerving to avoid an SUV, rolling over, and crashing into a building. Two firefighters were injured.

item.title: Rubio says Iran's Strait of Hormuz tolls are unacceptable
item.description: The Secretary of State tempered optimism for an Iran war deal, calling Tehran's plan to create a tolling system in the Strait of Hormuz unacceptable.

item.title: Feeding Our Future fraud ringleader Aimee Bock gets 41-year sentence
item.description: Aimee Bock, convicted of leading a $250 million Feeding Our Future fraud scheme in Minnesota, was sentenced to more than 40 years in prison.

item.title: Trump allies and Jan. 6 defendants apply for $1.7 billion fund
item.description: Jan. 6 defendants and Trump allies are seeking funds from the DOJ's $1.776 billion Anti-Weaponization Fund, announced this week.
